semantic.role: View Producer module that computes risk hotspot rankings from parsed source units for the ArchSpine diagnostic dashboard.
responsibilities: Analyzes loaded SpineUnit objects to identify code areas with elevated technical risk based on composite scoring.
Computes risk scores across multiple factors: rule violations, cross-boundary edges, adjacent test coverage, file age/churn, size/complexity, dependency fan-in, and suppression status.
Applies path suppression logic via isSuppressedPath to exclude non-actionable units.
Ranks and filters results to the top 12 risk hotspots, ordered by descending total score.
Produces structured IViewArtifactEnvelope payloads conforming to the view artifact schema, consumable by the view rendering pipeline.
outOfScope: Direct file system I/O or database access beyond reading provided units.
Real-time scanning or live change detection on source files.
CI/CD pipeline integration or execution orchestration.
invariants: Output is always limited to MAX_RISK_HOTSPOTS (12) items.
Scoring algorithm keys on seven discrete risk factors; no factor is added or removed without changing the analysis contract.
Path suppression via isSuppressedPath is applied before scoring, not after.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a pluggable View Producer within src/services/view/ that implements the risk-hotspot analysis domain logic, decoupled from rendering concerns through the ViewRenderer abstraction.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: General project refactor removing legacy CLI aliases, rebuilding documentation, and fixing schema; no evidence of tangible changes to risk-hotspot-view logic.

publicSurface.description: Analyzes an array of LoadedUnit objects and produces a structured IViewArtifactEnvelope containing up to 12 ranked risk hotspot items with composite scores, factor breakdowns, and confidence levels. Consumed by the view runtime for rendering the risk hotspots dashboard page.
